columns.name: PolicyName
values: Security group allows unrestricted SSH access
IAM user has inline policy with admin privileges
KMS key rotation is not enabled
EC2 instance has public IP in non-DMZ subnet
Lambda function has overly permissive IAM role
VPC flow logs are not enabled
EKS cluster endpoint is publicly accessible

columns.name: PolicyDescription
values: An S3 bucket is configured with public read or write access.
A security group allows inbound SSH (port 22) from 0.0.0.0/0.
An IAM user has an inline policy granting full administrative access.
CloudTrail logging is not enabled for this region.
An RDS instance is accessible from the public internet.
Automatic key rotation is not enabled for a KMS key.
An EC2 instance has a public IP address in a non-DMZ subnet.
A Lambda function's execution role has overly permissive policies.
VPC flow logging is not enabled for network traffic analysis.
The EKS cluster API endpoint is accessible from the public internet.

values.recommendation: Disable public access on S3 bucket ACL and bucket policy
Restrict SSH access to known IP ranges
Use managed policies with least privilege
